daily.today_energy: Your magnetic energy is flowing strong today, Leo. People are naturally drawn to your vibe, so lean into that confidence. This is your moment to shine without trying too hard—just be authentically you.
daily.love: Whether you're single or coupled up, vulnerability is your superpower rn. Let someone see the real you beneath the crown. Deep connections happen when you drop the performance and just exist.
daily.career: Your ideas are hitting different today. Don't sleep on that creative spark or that conversation you've been avoiding. Trust your instincts—they're sharper than usual and people are listening.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement and sunlight. Whether it's a walk, a workout, or just sitting outside, honor that call. Your energy shifts when you get physical—trust the process.

weekly.overview: This week's cosmic energy is asking you to embrace your authentic self, Leo. There's a magnetic pull toward meaningful conversations and deeper connections. Trust the timing of things unfolding around you.
weekly.love: Venus is whispering sweet possibilities into your orbit. Whether you're coupled or single, emotional honesty is your superpower right now. Let someone see the real you beneath the sparkle.
weekly.career: Your creative instincts are firing on all cylinders. This is the week to pitch that idea you've been sitting on or take on a project that genuinely excites you. Your passion is contagious.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for intentional movement and rest in equal measure. Find activities that feel joyful rather than obligatory—dancing, walking, whatever makes you feel alive and grounded.
